query: The generated anime video doesn't follow the poses closely enough. Can you increase the ControlNet conditioning strength?

desired.outcome: The output poses adhere more strictly to the OpenPose skeleton, creating a stylized video that closely tracks the input motion.
desired.quality: ControlNet strength is increased without changing the model or breaking the image‑to‑image pipeline; the rest of the workflow remains functional.

_tags.author_rationale: Tests agent’s ability to locate and adjust a single core parameter (control strength) in a low‑complexity ControlNet workflow, avoiding vague quality asks.
